PVRUtils Documentation
Namespace List
Here is a list of all documented namespaces with brief descriptions:
[detail level 123]
 ▼NpvrMain PowerVR Framework namespace
 NplatformThe pvr::platform namespace contains low-level, system-communication classes and functions
 ▼NuiMain namespace for the PVRUtils Library. Contains the UIRenderer and the several Sprite classes.
 NimplContains the implementation of the raw UIRenderer classes. In order to use the library, use the PowerVR Framework objects found in the pvr::ui namespace
 NutilsMain namespace for the PVRUtils Library
